title: Samsung’s foldables will get Google’s easier Android switching.
summary: Samsung Unpacked 2026: all the news from the July foldable launch Samsung Smart Switch will make it easier to jump from iOS to a Galaxy Z Flip 8 or Fold 8, sharing photos, videos, contacts and more with just a QR code…
